title: Motion Sensor should not use gyroscope
description: Using the gyroscope in motion sensor implementations can lead to increased battery consumption and may not be necessary for most use cases. Prefer using accelerometer and other low-power sensors unless gyroscope data is strictly required.
recommendation: Review motion sensor implementations and remove unnecessary use of the gyroscope to optimize battery usage.
impact: Increased battery drain and reduced device efficiency.

noncompliant: // ... code using gyroscope for simple motion detection ...

checks.message: Review motion sensor implementations and remove unnecessary use of the gyroscope to optimize battery usage.
